LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LUCIE KELLY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 6, 2013, TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN AUGUST 22, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LUCIE KELLY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS DENIED. STATUTORY PROVISIONS ARE TO BE LIBERALLY CONSTRUED TO EFFECTUATE SERVICE IF ACTUAL NOTICE HAS BEEN RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT. (SEE BEIN V. BRECHTEL-JOCHIM GROUP, INC. (1992) 6 CAL.APP.4TH 1387.) PLAINTIFF MET THE REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 415.20(B). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Cross Complainant's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to AUG-26-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-18-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Sep-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEROME M. YALON JR. OF BISHOP, WHITE & WEIBEL, TEL. NO. (925) 826-1829
APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LUCIE KELLY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is Denied. Statutory provisions are to be liberally construed to effectuate service if actual notice has been received by defendant. (See Bein v. Brechtel-Jochim Group, Inc. (1992) 6 Cal.App.4th 1387.) Plaintiff met the requirements of CCP 415.20(b). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Continued To Sep-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT LUCIE KELLY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS continued to September 6, 2013, to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposing papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 22, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. The court has courtesy copies of the moving papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/mjm
